title: Architecture
scope: Describes the two-track runtime pipeline (audio/voice and dialogue) for the VinFast callbot, covering ASR, VAD, mic capture, Vietnamese normalization, and pipeline ownership boundaries between Track A and Track B.
key_decisions: ASR runtime: faster-whisper CT2 chosen over cloud ASR for reproducible offline demo and WER control
Turn cutting: deterministic VAD interface chosen over dialogue-aware audio heuristics to keep engine independent from audio
Normalization: per-field parser chosen over global text replacement to avoid corrupting free-text fields like names
TTS primary: Piper local chosen over edge-tts primary for offline reproducibility
RAG: not used for Phase 1 in favour of static policy and state management
